provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 course-list PDF publishes separate Year 1 and Senior Year admission structures, two Year 1 strands, 38 unique confirmed course codes and group-level credit totals. Individual credits are recorded only for one-course groups whose published group total identifies that course directly; credits for multi-course groups remain unknown rather than being derived arithmetically. The three Cross-Faculty Core components have titles but no course codes in this Programme PDF and are omitted rather than assigned invented codes. This union course list preserves admission-path and Strand labels for planning and does not assert one fixed graduation path.
